table.clearBody: There is nothing to clear. | The one entry in this list will be removed. | All {count} entries in this list will be removed.

curve.interpolateHint: Follow the line between anchors. Off, each anchor holds until the next one.
curve.clearAllHint: Take every anchor out and leave the goal at the scale pitch.
curve.clearAllConfirm: Every anchor is taken out. The goal goes back to the scale pitch for every note, and the tuner becomes a plain indicator.
curve.startHint: No anchors yet. The goal is the scale pitch for every note.
curve.setHint: Put an anchor on this note for the rank selected.
curve.removeHint: Take this note’s anchor out of the curve.

help.lead: The goal you are tuning toward: how far each reed should sit from its scale pitch, note by note. A recorded reed is read against this, so the table calls it in or out against your target, not against dead-centre.
help.set: Pick a note and a value and press Set, or drag a point on the chart up or down. Each rank is its own line, and the one you are editing is highlighted.
help.interp: With Interpolate on, notes between your anchors follow the line; off, each anchor holds until the next. With no anchors the goal is the scale pitch everywhere.
